xwikidoc.name: TaskJson
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: TaskJson
xwikidoc.content: {{velocity}} #if ($xcontext.action == 'get') #set ($offset = $numbertool.toNumber($request.offset).intValue()) ## The offset sent by the live table starts at 1. #set ($offset = $offset - 1) #if (!$offset || $offset < 0) #set ($offset = 0) #end #set ($limit = $numbertool.toNumber($request.limit).intValue()) #if (!$limit) #set ($limit = 15) #end #set ($tourId = $request.tourId) #set ($searchedTitle = $request.title) #if (!$searchedTitle) #set ($searchedTitle = '') #end #set ($allTasks = $services.guidedtour.getTourTasks($tourId, $searchedTitle)) #if ($offset < $allTasks.size()) #set ($toIndex = $mathtool.min($mathtool.add($offset, $limit), $allTasks.size())) #set ($resultList = []) #set ($toIndex = $mathtool.sub($toIndex,1)) #foreach ($i in [$offset..$toIndex]) #set ($task = $allTasks.get($i)) #set ($discard = $resultList.add($task)) #end #end #set ($results = { "totalrows": $allTasks.size(), "returnedrows": $resultList.size(), "offset": $mathtool.add($offset, 1), "rows": [] }) #foreach ($currentEntry in $resultList) #set ($tourRef = $services.model.resolveDocument($tourId)) #set ($docRef = $services.model.resolveDocument($currentEntry.getId(), $tourRef.getParent())) #set ($docURL = $xwiki.getURL($docRef)) #set ($docName = "$escapetool.xml($currentEntry.getTitle())") #set ($numberOfSteps = $xwiki.getDocument($docRef).getObjects('XWiki.GuidedTour.StepClass').size()) #set ($deleteRef = "${request.getContextPath()}/rest/guidedTour/tours/${tourId}/tasks/${currentEntry.getId()}") #set ($deleteAction = "Delete") #set ($discard = $results.rows.add({ 'order': $currentEntry.getOrder(), 'title' : $docName, 'steps' : $numberOfSteps, 'actions' : $deleteAction })) #end #jsonResponse($results) #end {{/velocity}}
